text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 
13 
ASC_MDCR_PMT 
LABEL: 
Ambulatory Surgery Center Medicare Payments 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments in the Part B ambulatory surgery center (ASC) setting for a 
given year. ASC claims are a subset of the claim lines in the Part B carrier data file. 
The ASC claim lines are identified by the claim lines where the LINE_CMS_TYPE_SRVC_CD = “F.” The 
total
